notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Braves challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was upheld: Jakob Marsee reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Ha-Seong Kim.

notableEvents.label: Javier Sanoja grand slam
